sources.name: HMRC Overseas Trade — pharmaceutical products (HS 30)
sources.note: Monthly per-partner trade in HS chapter 30 (medicines, vaccines, blood products, surgical sutures, dressings).

sources.name: ONS Index of Production — Pharmaceutical preparations (K23A)
sources.note: Monthly production index, 2022 = 100, CVMSA. Covers SIC 21.

sources.name: UK pharma manufacturing turnover, 2022 baseline
sources.note: UK pharmaceutical manufacturing turnover in 2022 ≈ £25bn (≈ £2.08bn/month at K23A = 100). Used to scale the index. Most UK pharma 'production' is fill-and-finish of imported active ingredients, so the domestic share overstates self-sufficiency on a strategic-resilience reading.

sources.name: Voeten — UN General Assembly Voting Data
sources.note: Used to classify each trade partner into an alignment bucket.

monthly.description: Monthly UK pharma supply: production estimate (K23A index × 2022 baseline) plus imports broken down by trade partner alignment.

byPartner.description: Per-partner totals across the 24-month window; sorted by total imports descending.
